description: Spring Boot config with crypto settings. Note: this directory previously scanned this very manifest as a config file (dir name contains 'crypto') and its own 'expectedAlgorithms' key false-positived against the 'algorithm' vocabulary (review finding B7) -- fixed by segment-bound key matching in pkg/engines/configscanner/vocabulary.go, so this file no longer produces a finding. minFindings/expectedAlgorithms are unchanged: application.yml alone still satisfies both (AES x2, TLS via the TLSv1.2 protocol finding).
